name_en: 💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear

Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁
